name: AF Cluster
description: Given a multiple sequence alignment (MSA) a3m file, generate clusters for conformation prediction. Receive pdbs of your structure in different conformations based on the clusters.
capabilities: Given a multiple sequence alignment (MSA) a3m file, generate clusters for conformation prediction
Receive pdbs of your structure in different conformations based on the clusters

msaFile.description: Multiple sequence alignment (MSA) file in A3M format for conformation clustering

sequence.description: Protein amino acid sequence. If provided without MSA file, an MSA will be generated automatically.

numModels.description: Number of structure models to generate per cluster
